name: Decompose
desc: Explode a body and spawn 3 Leeches.

name: Decompose
desc: Explode a body and spawn 5 Leeches.

name: Reanimate
desc: Resurrect a body to half HP. It becomes a Zombie and joins your team.

name: Reanimate2
desc: Resurrect a body to full HP. It becomes a Zombie and joins your team.

name: Rebirth
desc: Teleport into a body, destroying it to heal 4 HP, gain +1 [img:int] and +1 [img:con].

name: Rebirth
desc: Teleport into a body, destroying it to heal 4 HP and gain All Stats Up.

name: Pestilence
desc: Deal 1 damage to all units.

name: Pestilence2
desc:
Deal 1 damage to all units.
[s:.7](This spell costs less.)[/s]

name: Weakness
desc: Inflict Weakness 5 on a unit.

name: Weakness2
desc: Give a unit Weakness 5 and All Stats Down.

name: DarkRitual
desc: Destroy an adjacent body. The next spell you cast costs 0 mana.

name: SoulSuck2
desc: Destroy an adjacent body. The next 2 spells you cast cost 0 mana.

name: EvilIncarnate
desc: Inflict Fear on all enemies.

name: EvilIncarnate2
desc: Inflict Fear 1 and Weakness 2 on all enemies.

name: SoulLink
desc: Inflict Soul Link on units in an area.

name: SoulLink2
desc: Inflict Soul Link on units in a large area.

name: WeAreOne
desc: Inflict Soul Link on yourself and every enemy.

name: WeAreOne2
desc: Inflict Soul Link on yourself and every enemy. Gain +2 [img:con] and heal 8 HP.

name: BloodRain
desc: Take 1 damage and heal all allies 1 HP.

name: BloodRain2
desc: Take 1 damage, heal all allies 1 HP and give them +1 mana.

name: EternalServitude
desc: Resurrect an enemy body to full HP. It joins your team.

name: AnimateDead2
desc: Resurrect an enemy body to full HP. It joins your team and takes an extra turn after this one.

name: DeathBloom
desc: Explode a body, dealing damage and Knockback to adjacent units.

name: DeathBloom
desc: Explode a body, dealing damage and Knockback to units in a large area.

name: Scare
desc: Teleport in front of an enemy then Knockback each adjacent unit 4 tiles.

name: Scare2
desc: Teleport in front of an enemy then inflict Knockback 4 and Fear on each adjacent unit.

name: SoulTransfer
desc: Give a unit +1 [img:con] and heal it 4 HP. You gain -1 [img:con] and lose 4 health.

name: SoulTransfer2
desc:
Give a unit +1 [img:con] and heal it 4 HP. You gain -1 [img:con] and lose 4 health.
This spell can revive units. If the unit revived was an enemy it gets charmed for the battle.

name: SlitWrists
desc: Deal 2 damage to yourself.

name: Whisper
desc: Inflict Fear and Madness on an adjacent unit.

name: Whisper2
desc: Inflict Fear 1 and Madness 2 on a unit in range 4.

name: SummonShade
desc:
Spawn a shadow copy of yourself that fades after its first turn.
[s:.7](The copy can't cast this ability or give extra turns to units.)[/s]

name: SummonShade2
desc:
Spawn a shadow copy of yourself that fades after its second turn.
[s:.7](The copy can't cast this ability or give extra turns to units.)[/s]

name: DarkStep
desc: Teleport to an open tile.

name: DarkStep2
desc: Teleport to a tile. If you teleport into a unit you both take 5 damage, then inflict Fear on it.

name: Leeches
desc: Inflict Leech 1 on a unit.

name: Leeches2
desc: Inflict Leech 1 and Mana Leech 1 on a unit.

name: Shriek
desc: Inflict Fear 1, Confusion 2, and Madness 2 on units within a cone.

name: Shriek2
desc: Inflict Fear 1, Confusion 2, Madness 2 and drain 2 HP from units within a cone.

name: Seppuku
desc: Down yourself.

name: FullMoon
desc: Give Lifesteal 1 to units in an area.

name: FullMoon2
desc: Give Lifesteal 3 to units in an area.

name: Unearth
desc: Dig up a body. It reanimates at the end of the round.

name: Unearth2
desc:
Dig up a body. It reanimates at the end of the round.
[s:.7](This spell costs less.)[/s]

name: BloodGeyser
desc: Take damage equal to half of your max HP, then deal that much damage and inflict Fear 2 on another unit.

name: BloodGeyser2
desc: Take damage equal to half of your max HP, then deal that much damage and inflict Fear 2 on units in an area.

name: Flatline
desc:
Down yourself. You don't get injured. Spawn a shadow copy of yourself that fades after its first turn.
[s:.7]The copy can't cast this ability or give extra turns to units.[/s]

name: Flatline2
desc:
Down yourself. You don't get injured. Spawn a shadow copy of yourself that fades after its first turn.
[s:.7]The copy can't cast this ability or give extra turns to units.[/s]
[s:.7](This spell costs 0 mana.)[/s]

name: Replace
desc: Teleport into a familiar and destroy it. Refresh your basic attack.

name: Replace2
desc: Teleport into a familiar and destroy it. Refresh your basic attack and heal 5 HP.

name: SummonBones
desc: Summon a skeleton from a body.

name: SummonBones2
desc:
Summon a skeleton from a body, anywhere.
[s:.7](This spell costs less.)[/s]

name: GigaDrain
desc: Spend all of your mana, then drain that much HP from an adjacent unit. Ignores shield.

name: GigaDrain2
desc: Spend all of your mana, then drain that much HP from a unit in range 3. Ignores shield.

name: Bloodletting
desc: Remove all status effects from another unit, then inflict Bleed 5 on it.

name: Bloodletting2
desc:
Remove all status effects from another unit, then inflict Bleed 5 on it.
[s:.7](This spell costs less.)[/s]

name: MassPsychosis
desc: Inflict Madness on all enemies.

name: MassPsychosis2
desc:
Inflict Madness on all enemies.
[s:.7](This spell costs less.)[/s]

name: Debone
desc: Deal damage and inflict Weakness on an adjacent unit. If you have no weapon, equip a bone.

name: Debone2
desc: Deal damage, inflict Weakness and Immobile on an adjacent unit. If you have no weapon, equip a bone.

name: Reap
desc: Teleport into a unit with 5 or less health and destroy it.

name: Reap2
desc:
Teleport into a unit with 10 or less health and destroy it.
[s:.7](This spell costs less.)[/s]

name: Haunt
desc:
Damage any unit and inflict Fear.
[s:.7]Castable while downed.[/s]

name: Spook
desc:
Deal damage to any unit. This has a 25% chance to inflict Fear.
[s:.7]Castable while downed.[/s]

name: CarrionShot
desc:
Deal 1 damage and inflict Leech 1.
[s:.7]This spell is stronger and castable while you're downed.[/s]

name: CarrionShot
desc:
Deal 1 damage and inflict Leech 1.
[s:.7]This spell is stronger and castable while you're downed.[/s]

desc:
Deal 2 damage and inflict Leech 2.
[s:.7]This spell is stronger and castable while you're downed.[/s]

name: CarrionShot_Afterlife2
desc:
Deal 2 damage and inflict Leech 2.
[s:.7]This spell is stronger and castable while you're downed.[/s]

name: Lifedrain
desc:
Drain 2 HP at melee range.
[s:.7]This spell is much stronger and castable while you're downed. If this kills a unit, revive with 50% hp.[/s]

name: Lifedrain
desc:
Drain 2 HP at melee range.
[s:.7]This spell is much stronger and castable while you're downed. If this kills a unit, revive with 50% hp.[/s]

name: LifeDrain2
desc:
Drain 2 HP at melee range.
[s:.7]This spell is much stronger and castable while you're downed. If this kills a unit, revive with max hp.[/s]

name: LifeDrain_Afterlife2
desc:
Drain 2 HP at melee range.
[s:.7]This spell is much stronger and castable while you're downed. If this kills a unit, revive with max hp.[/s]

name: CoffinFlop
desc:
Jump to an open tile in range 2.
[s:.7]This spell is stronger and castable while you're downed. When downed you can land on units dealing damage and inflicting Madness. [/s]

name: CoffinFlop
desc:
Jump to an open tile in range 2.
[s:.7]This spell is stronger and castable while you're downed. When downed you can land on units dealing damage and inflicting Madness. [/s]

name: CoffinFlop2
desc:
Jump to an open tile in range 3.
[s:.7]This spell is stronger and castable while you're downed. When downed you can land on units anywhere dealing damage and inflicting Madness 2. [/s]

name: CoffinFlop_Afterlife2
desc:
Jump to an open tile in range 3.
[s:.7]This spell is stronger and castable while you're downed. When downed you can land on units anywhere dealing damage and inflicting Madness 2. [/s]

name: DonateBlood
desc:
Heal a unit 5 HP, then take 10 damage.
[s:.7]Castable while you're downed. If you do, take no damage and give what you heal All Stats Up.[/s]

name: DonateBlood
desc:
Heal a unit 5 HP, then take 10 damage.
[s:.7]Castable while you're downed. If you do, take no damage and give what you heal All Stats Up.[/s]

name: DonateBlood2
desc:
Heal all units in an area 5 HP, then take 10 damage.
[s:.7]Castable while you're downed. If you do, take no damage and give what you heal All Stats Up.[/s]

name: DonateBlood_Afterlife2
desc:
Heal all units in an area 5 HP, then take 10 damage.
[s:.7]Castable while you're downed. If you do, take no damage and give what you heal All Stats Up.[/s]

name: Seance
desc:
Spawn a ghost Familiar that fades after its first turn.
[s:.7]Castable while you're downed. If you do, spawn a shadow copy of yourself instead.[/s]

name: Seance
desc:
Spawn a ghost Familiar that fades after its first turn.
[s:.7]Castable while you're downed. If you do, spawn a shadow copy of yourself instead.[/s]

desc:
Spawn a ghost Familiar that fades after its second turn.
[s:.7]Castable while you're downed. If you do, spawn a shadow copy of yourself instead.[/s]

desc:
Spawn a ghost Familiar that fades after its second turn.
[s:.7]Castable while you're downed. If you do, spawn a shadow copy of yourself instead.[/s]

name: GoLimp
desc: Until your next turn, you won't get injured if you're downed.

name: GoLimp2
desc:
Until your next turn, you won't get injured if you're downed.
When downed, inflict Confusion 10 on the unit that downed you.

name: DemonicPact
desc:
Injure yourself and take an extra turn.
[s:.7](This spell can't be cast on extra turns.)[/s]

name: DemonicPact2
desc:
Injure yourself and take an extra turn.
[s:.7](This spell costs less. This spell can't be cast on extra turns.)[/s]

name: Curse
desc: Give a unit -4 [img:lck].

name: Curse2
desc:
Give a unit -4 [img:lck].
[s:.7](This spell has increased range)[/s]

name: LeechSwarm
desc: Inflict Leech 3 on all units, except yourself.

name: LeechSwarm2
desc: Inflict Leech 1 on each allied unit and Leech 3 on all other units, except yourself.

name: Feed
desc: Destroy an adjacent body. Your basic attack inflicts +1 Leech for the rest of the battle.

name: Feed
desc: Destroy a body at range. Your basic attack inflicts +1 Leech for the rest of the battle.

name: Hush
desc: Inflict Sleep 1 on an adjacent unit.

name: Hush2
desc: Inflict Sleep 1 on a unit in range 4.

name: ReaperStep
desc: Teleport to an open tile in range 1. Whenever a unit dies, this spell's range increases by 1.

name: ReaperStep2
desc: Teleport to a tile in range 1, dealing damage to units you land on. Whenever a unit dies, this spell's range and damage increase by 1.

name: ForbiddenFamine
desc:
Inflict Weakness 5, Poison 2, and Madness 2 on all enemies.
There are permanent consequences for casting this spell… but maybe not for you. 
[s:.7](Castable once per battle.)[/s]

name: ForbiddenFamine2
desc:
Inflict Leech 2, Weakness 5, Poison 2, and Madness 2 on all enemies.
There are permanent consequences for casting this spell… but maybe not for you. 
[s:.7](Castable once per battle.)[/s]

name: FleshGolem
desc:
You and all allies lose 10 HP. Summon a flesh golem with one random spell from each of those units.
[s:.7](Castable once per battle.)[/s]

name: FleshGolem2
desc:
You and all allies lose 10 HP. Summon a flesh golem with one random spell and random passives from each of those units.
[s:.7](Castable once per battle.)[/s]

name: TradeLife
desc:
Swap HP with an ally in range 3.
[s:.7]Castable while you're downed. If this spell downs you or the ally, neither are injured.[/s]

name: TradeLife2
desc:
Swap HP with any ally.
[s:.7]Castable while you're downed. If this spell downs you or the ally, neither are injured.[/s]

name: TradeLife
desc:
Swap HP with an ally in range 3.
[s:.7]Castable while you're downed. If this spell downs you or the ally, neither are injured.[/s]

name: TradeLife_Afterlife2
desc:
Swap HP with any ally.
[s:.7]Castable while you're downed. If this spell downs you or the ally, neither are injured.[/s]

name: AbsorbSoul
desc:
Down an ally in range 5 and steal their mana. It doesn't get injured.
[s:.7](Castable once per turn.)[/s]

name: AbsorbSoul2
desc:
Down any ally and steal their mana. It doesn't get injured.
[s:.7](Castable once per turn.)[/s]

name: Gravecrawl
desc: Dig to any tile and unearth a body.

name: Gravecrawl
desc:
Dig to any tile and unearth 1-3 bodies.

desc: Dig to any tile and unearth 4 zombies.

name: DigUpTheDead2
desc:
Dig to any tile and unearth 4 zombies.

desc: Inflict Infested 1 on a unit in range 3.

name: ClewOfLeeches2
